title: Milestone Camping 88070 Inflatable Pillow/Camping & Travel Pillow/Waterproof Flocked Surface/Easy Inflate & Deflate/Lightweight & Compact / 53cm x 26xcm Inflated Size,Blue
features: INFLATABLE PILLOW – This Inflatable Pillow from Milestone will help to give you a good night’s sleep anywhere, anytime! It is designed to be comfortable while also being convenient and portable.
USE ANYWHERE – No matter where you are, the pillow is easy to set up and use while travelling, camping, at festivals, or even if you’re just looking for a replacement pillow at home.

FLOCKED DESIGN – The pillow’s flocked design, featuring a layer of smooth vinyl on top, gives it waterproof properties, so that you’ll be able to rest your head on a dry surface even if you’ve had to carry it through the rain!

EASILY INFLATE & DEFLATE – Thanks to its relatively compact size, the pillow can be inflated by an electric pump in a very short time, so you won’t have to wait long before getting your head down. Once you’re done using it, it deflates just as easily, and can be folded up to less than half of its original size, making it convenient to store.

MILESTONE CAMPING – Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. From tents and sleeping bags, to chairs and camp cutlery, visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Soft Flocked Surface Inflatable Travel Pillow Rest comfortably wherever you go using this Inflatable Travel Pillow. The pillow is quickly inflated via an electric pump, and can also be deflated and folded easily for compact storage. The pillow's material is waterproof and features a flocked surface to prevent slipping. Previous page Portable Pillow This pillow is easily set up and is ideal for camping, festivals, travelling, or even at home. Easy Inflate/Deflate The pillow can be quickly inflated or deflated by simply using a pump on the built-in valve. Flocked Surface The pillow's flocked surface provides comfort while also preventing your head from slipping off. Waterproof Material With a layer of vinyl across the top, this pillow is waterproof, making it suited for the outdoors. Next page 1 Portable Pillow 2 Easy Inflate/Deflate 3 Flocked Surface 4 Waterproof Material
